Without this, every importComponentByKeyAsync call will fail. Risk is high since the file is structurally complex (12 listed pages with PROD/dev/WIP/CR/HOLD states).

Rule 7.4 (canonical-source inspection): NOT performed. The 'History + Connections' WIP page (7935:28001) IS the canonical for this build's target. questions_for_user: Plugin version: local 3.71.0, remote 3.79.2. Update the plugin first (run `claude plugin marketplace update sumsub-design && claude plugin update sumsub-design@sumsub-design`), or 'continue anyway' on 3.71.0 for this build? Skill mandates I ask before proceeding.

Where to create the Connections page? (a) extend existing 'History + Connections' WIP canonical at node 7935:28001 inside F38QSCQ62kCVe8ROwpXdvn — risky, would touch teammate's WIP; (b) create new frame on 🛠 Drafts page in the same file — safe sandbox, my default for builds; (c) new file in Sumsub org. Recommend (b).

What is a 'connected service' in Sumsub ID Account context? Sumsub ID is a decentralized identity / passport-style product — 'connections' could mean: (i) Web3 wallets (MetaMask / WalletConnect / Coinbase / etc.), (ii) Social-login providers (Google / Apple / Microsoft / Facebook), (iii) Partner KYC reuses (apps that pulled this user's verified identity via Sumsub Connect — e.g. MiniPay, age-verification partners), (iv) Active sessions / Magic-link grants, (v) API integrations. Pick the scope or all of the above grouped into sections.

Pattern A confirmed (1440 × 1080, full-width Header 64, Sidebar/Desktop 384, content wrapper 1024 starting at x=384 y=32)? File memory has dimensions but a fresh inspection of the canonical Account page (node 3416:14299) before build is required to confirm the Header instance still uses these dims and to capture the correct component keys.

Active sidebar nav item — which menu entry should be 'Selected' for the Connections page? Sumsub ID Account sidebar has entries like Profile / Documents / Emails / MFA / Trusted devices / History / Connections. Need to inspect the Sidebar/Desktop component variants for which property exposes Selected (per Rule 7.40 — not all sidebars expose this via Plugin API).

Connection list density and states: how many rows? Mix of statuses (Connected / Pending / Revoked / Expired)? Per-row Last-active timestamp? Per-row 'Disconnect' kebab action? Realistic-data fill is mandatory per Rule #7 — no 'Service A / Service B' placeholders.

Was simulation mode (plan + honest log without invoking use_figma due to blockers) the right call here, or should I have force-pushed past Rule #0 and built into 🛠 Drafts with assumed scope? Per skill rules, force-pushing is banned ('auto mode does not override Rule #0'). Logged blockers honestly per simulation contract.
